mapper.select: SELECT e.*, d.name AS department_name, p.name AS position_name FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department d ON e.department_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN position p ON e.position_id = p.position_id

SELECT e.*, d.name AS department_name, p.name AS position_name FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department d ON e.department_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN position p ON e.position_id = p.position_id WHERE e.name = #{name}

SELECT e.*, d.name AS department_name, p.name AS position_name FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department d ON e.department_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN position p ON e.position_id = p.position_id WHERE e.emp_id = #{empId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee (name, email, password, phone, img_url, department_id, position_id, member_role) VALUES (#{name}, #{email}, #{password}, #{phone}, #{imgUrl}, #{departmentId}, #{positionId}, #{memberRole})
mapper.update: UPDATE employee SET name = #{name}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, department_id = #{departmentId}, position_id = #{positionId} WHERE emp_id = #{empId}
UPDATE employee SET department_id = #{departmentId} WHERE emp_id = #{empId}
UPDATE employee SET position_id = #{positionId} WHERE emp_id = #{empId}
UPDATE employee SET member_role = NULL WHERE emp_id = #{empId}
UPDATE employee SET password = #{password} WHERE emp_id = #{empId}
